feat(p3): static pages migration

Pages migrated from al-hayaat.webflow/ HTML sources:
- / (Home)  hero, why cards, subjects grid, animated stats, mission CTA
- /about  mission/vision, team (Dr. Mohebbi, Alkhafagi, Namus), office location
- /curriculum  7 subjects grid, educators section
- /school-plan  phase accordion (20262031), \ fundraising target
- /admissions  enrollment cards, 5-step process, documents, fee table
- /admissions/apply  static registration form UI (API wiring in P4)
- /careers — why-join cards, Elementary School Teacher listing
- /careers/elementary-school-teacher  full job detail page
- /contact  contact info + static form UI (API wiring in P4)
- /contact/ContactForm  client component form

Content JSON files: home.json (extended), about.json, curriculum.json,
school-plan.json, admissions.json, careers.json, contact.json

All content sourced from Webflow HTML  no invented copy.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove HTTPS from service discovery fallback config

iOS simulator rejects self-signed dev certs on localhost:7012.
When running outside Aspire, only HTTP (localhost:5081) is needed.
When Aspire launches with dev tunnels, env vars provide HTTPS URLs.

commit.message:
fix: use Aspire service discovery for API and sync URLs

Replace manual env var parsing with Aspire service discovery URIs
(https+http://api, https+http://web). MauiServiceDefaults already
configures service discovery for all HttpClients — now the base
addresses use the proper scheme so resolution works automatically.

When launched from Aspire: env vars override with dev tunnel URLs.
When launched manually: Services config in appsettings.json provides
fallback URLs (http://localhost:5081 for API, http://localhost:5240
for sync).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(p2+infra): component library + dual-stack infrastructure

P2 Component Library (TASK-037 through TASK-045):
- Navigation, MobileNav, Footer, FooterNewsletter with content from Webflow source
- Layout primitives: Container, Section, Grid, PageHeader
- Core UI: HeroSection, FeatureCard, WhyCard, CTASection, Icon, ImageWrapper
- Interactive: AccordionList, TabsPanel, TooltipWrapper, AvatarDisplay, Divider, ProgressBar
- Form: FormField, TextareaField, SelectField, RadioGroupField, FileUpload, SubmitButton
- Data display: DataCard, EmptyState, LoadingSpinner, SkeletonBlock, PaginationBar
- Feedback: AlertBanner, Modal, ConfirmDialog, ToastProvider (sonner)
- Animations: FadeIn, SlideIn, AnimatedCounter
- Barrel exports: src/components/index.ts, src/components/ui/index.ts, src/components/layout/index.ts

Infrastructure refactor (dual-stack, dual-RG):
- infrastructure/stacks/infra/  PostgreSQL, Key Vault, Storage, User-Assigned Managed Identity
  Resource group: rg-alhayaat-infra-{env}
- infrastructure/stacks/app/  App Service Plan, App Service, App Insights
  Resource group: rg-alhayaat-app-{env}
- Managed identity grants Key Vault Secrets User role in infra stack  no cross-RG role assignments
- App Service uses user-assigned identity (AZURE_CLIENT_ID app setting) for KV references
- New GitHub Actions workflows: deploy-infra-dev/staging/prod.yml
- Updated deploy-dev/staging/prod.yml to be code-only pipelines
- Removed monolithic infrastructure/main.bicep and infrastructure/modules/

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: add NSAllowsLocalNetworking for iOS dev HTTP access

iOS App Transport Security blocks cleartext HTTP by default.
The API fallback URL is http://localhost:5081 which was being
silently rejected. NSAllowsLocalNetworking permits HTTP to
localhost and .local domains for development.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: audit shared UI vs WebApp page duplication

Reviewed all 6 WebApp Account pages against shared UI equivalents.
All Account pages must remain separate — they form a cohesive server-side
ASP.NET Identity cookie auth workflow that can't work in Blazor interactive mode.

Key findings:
- Login/Register: cookie auth via form POST (can't set cookies over WebSocket)
- ForgotPassword: email link URL generation is server-bound
- ResetPassword: no shared UI equivalent exists
- AccessDenied/ConfirmEmail: ASP.NET auth infrastructure redirect targets
- Gap: no shared UI ResetPasswordPage for MAUI users

Template pages (Counter, Weather, Home) were already removed in prior commit.
No non-auth page duplication found — all activity pages exist only in shared UI.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: CS-PILOT
repository.description: Plate forme libre pour les centres sociaux et associations

commit.message:
fix: auto-confirm email in dev mode on API login endpoint

The API login endpoint enforced email confirmation for all environments,
but the WebApp's ServerAuthService never checks it. Users who registered
on the web had unconfirmed emails — web login worked, mobile login via
/api/auth/login returned 401 'Email not confirmed.'

In development mode, the login endpoint now auto-confirms unconfirmed
emails (matching the Register endpoint's dev behavior). Production
still requires email confirmation.

Also improved IdentityAuthService logging to include the response body
on login failures for easier debugging.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add GGUF format support to download-model utility

- Implement downloadGGUFModel() function for GGUF format downloads
- Add GGUF model registry mapping (vonjack/whisper-large-v3-gguf)
- Support --gguf flag for downloading community GGUF conversions
- Update README with GGUF download examples and recommendations
- Both old ggml format (legacy) and GGUF format (recommended) now supported

GGUF is the recommended format for whisper.go. Community-maintained
GGUF conversions are available on HuggingFace (vonjack, OllmOne, etc.)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: document available GGUF format whisper models

Investigation revealed:
- whisper.cpp uses custom ggml format (.bin), not GGUF
- Community has created GGUF-converted models on HuggingFace
- Multiple repos available: vonjack, OllmOne, FL33TW00D-HF, etc.

Our Go implementation targets GGUF (modern, standardized format).
Solution: Use community GGUF models instead of official .bin files.

Lists available GGUF repos and explains how whisper.cpp works.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: revert to GGUF-only support

Removed incomplete old ggml format routing. Focus on GGUF format models
which is the current standard for whisper.cpp distribution.

Alternative solutions documented in OLD_FORMAT_STATUS.md:
- Find GGUF-converted models
- Create .bin to .gguf converter
- Use official Python conversion tools

See DOWNLOAD_TEST_REPORT.md for issue discovery.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

cleanup: remove incomplete old ggml format parser

Removed oldformat.go as the reverse-engineered format structure is
incomplete and causes EOF errors during parsing.

Format detection infrastructure remains in place for future use when
a complete format specification is available.

See OLD_FORMAT_STATUS.md for analysis and recommendations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: document old ggml format implementation status

Added detailed analysis of attempted old format implementation:
- What was completed (format detection, type mapping)
- Why it's incomplete (binary format more complex than expected)
- Four solution options with pros/cons
- Recommendation to focus on GGUF models instead

Decision: Old format reverse-engineering not worth time investment.
Alternative paths more practical.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add auto-detection for old ggml format files

Implemented format detection in Open() to identify old ggml files (magic 'lmgg')
and route to appropriate parser. Added oldformat.go with parsing logic.

Note: Old ggml binary format reverse-engineering is incomplete - the format
structure is more complex than initial analysis indicated. Requires deeper
investigation or access to official format specification from whisper.cpp.

Recommendation: Use GGUF-format models or implement conversion tool.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add ForgotPasswordPage for shared UI (mobile)

Matches web ForgotPassword layout. Calls POST /api/auth/forgot-password
via AuthClient. Always shows success to prevent email enumeration.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add download and format test report

Documents successful download-model execution but format mismatch issue.
HuggingFace ggerganov/whisper.cpp has old ggml format (.bin),
not GGUF format that our parser expects.

Four solutions proposed:
1. Add old ggml format support (recommended)
2. Find GGUF model versions
3. Create conversion tool
4. Use Python conversion scripts

Includes complete test methodology and reproduction steps.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: fix download-model format and add test audio

Fixed download-model to use correct .bin file extension from HuggingFace.
Created synthetic test.wav for integration testing.

Note: Current ggerganov/whisper.cpp repo contains old ggml .bin format,
not GGUF. Next step: either add old format support or find GGUF models.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
build: enhance Makefile with comprehensive targets

Added useful tasks:
  make help              - Show help
  make build             - Build all binaries
  make test              - Run tests with race detector
  make lint              - Run linter
  make clean             - Remove build artifacts
  make install           - Install to GOPATH/bin
  make whisper           - Build whisper CLI only
  make quantize          - Build quantize tool only
  make download-model    - Build download-model only
  make run               - Build and run whisper CLI

Tested and working with all targets.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: auto-set version from git tag before build

When tag v1.2.3 is pushed, workflow extracts '1.2.3' and runs
'npm version 1.2.3 --no-git-tag-version' to update package.json
before electron-builder runs — so output binaries carry the correct
version without any manual edits.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): implement full Whisper CLI with all whisper.cpp flags

- Model selection (-m/--model)
- Processing options (threads, language, translate, split-on-word, max-len, offset-t, duration)
- Voice activity detection (--vad, --vad-model)
- Sampling parameters (temperature, entropy-thold, logprob-thold, threshold)
- Beam search options (best-of, beam-size)
- Output formatting (print-colors, print-special, print-confidence, no-timestamps)
- Audio offset and duration slicing
- Automatic audio resampling to 16kHz
- Proper error handling and exit codes
- Verbosity control

Matches whisper.cpp CLI interface exactly with short and long flag names.

- Implement 4-layer CNN encoder with ReLU activations

commit.message:
Add in-memory API response caching with 15-min time bucketing

Query time ranges are bucketed to 15-minute boundaries (floor/ceil),
so photos taken within the same window reuse cached API responses
without making additional API calls. Cache is in-memory (module-level
table), keyed by icao_bucketFrom_bucketTo. Cache hits shown as
'⚡ Cached' in the search context header. Includes clearCache()
method for manual cache invalidation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix BackfillUserProfileIdsAsync crash on fresh mobile DB

On fresh installs, the UserProfileId columns may not exist yet
(migrations only run during sync, not at app startup). Added a
column existence check before attempting the backfill SQL to
prevent SQLite Error 1: 'no such column: UserProfileId'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix tab selection: use tab_view value binding instead of observers

Observers on per-tab dropdowns fire during dialog initialization,
clobbering the activeTab tracking. Instead, bind tab_view's value
property directly to activeTabId, which LR SDK updates when the
user switches tabs. Read the correct dropdown at dialog close based
on the active tab identifier.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: add CFL-030/031/032 regression tests to test-json-tools.sh

- S11: extended-test-profiles/ crash profiles (CFL-030 GetValues SBO)
- S12: FIFO non-seekable fd test (CFL-031 ftell overflow)
- S13: invalid interp values 2/33/255 (CFL-032 enum UBSAN)
